extraction.one_line_summary: CARTHI Luke rode solo over three HC climbs from the gun, taking KOM jersey and maiden WT win while BERNAL defended GC against DENNIS' summit attack.
tactical_patterns: CARTHI stretched on climb one, extended on climb two, stayed clear on climb three—INEOS never chased solo breakaway rider.
DENNIS attacked only near Furka Pass summit, too late to crack BERNAL with 22-second deficit requiring distance not late jabs.
CATUSHA SERRY abandoned GC defense to attack mid-race from 7th overall, wilted in heat suggesting pacing misjudgment on triple-HC day.

rider_signals.CARTHI Luke: positive: maintained solo effort across three HC climbs from km 0, indicating exceptional pacing discipline and climbing endurance
rider_signals.DENNIS Rohan: negative: attacked only near final summit despite needing 22 seconds, revealing tactical hesitation or insufficient strength to distance Bernal earlier
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: positive: marked Dennis' late attack comfortably while other GC riders drifted back, showing superior heat tolerance
rider_signals.SERRY Pieter: negative: abandoned defensive 7th place to attack mid-race, then wilted in heat, exposing poor tactical judgment on extreme stage
